utterances.speaker: Mr. Treeger
utterances.text: Cause you are a little princess ! " Daddy , buy me a pizza . Daddy , buy me a candy factory . Daddy , make the cast of Cats sing Happy Birthday to me ... "

utterances.text: You think you could come here make a mess and the big man in coveralls will come in here and clean it up , huh ?
